post.description:
Creates a complete Digital SAT test structure with:
    - 2 Sections: English (Reading/Writing) and Math
    - 3 Modules per section: Module 1 (EASY), Module 2 EASY, Module 2 HARD
    - English: 27 questions per module, 32 minutes each
    - Math: 22 questions per module, 35 minutes each
    - 10-minute break after English section

    After creation, add questions to each module using POST /tests/modules/:moduleId/questions

201.description: SAT test template created successfully with module IDs for adding questions

403.description: Forbidden - Requires ADMIN or OWNER role

get.description: Check if all modules have the required number of questions and the test is ready for students

200.description: Returns validation status with details about each module

403.description: Forbidden - Requires ADMIN or OWNER role

get.description: Get analytics for a test including view count, attempt count, completion rate, average score, and average completion time

403.description: Forbidden - Requires ADMIN or OWNER role

post.description:
Upload an image to be used with a question (e.g., math diagrams, graphs, charts).

**Supported formats:** JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG
**Maximum size:** 5MB

After uploading, use the returned URL in the `imageUrl` field when creating or updating a question.

403.description: Forbidden - Requires ADMIN or OWNER role

post.description:
Upload an image to be used with an answer choice (e.g., math expressions, diagrams as options).

**Supported formats:** JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG
**Maximum size:** 5MB

After uploading, use the returned URL in the `imageUrl` field when creating or updating a choice.

403.description: Forbidden - Requires ADMIN or OWNER role

delete.description: Delete a previously uploaded image from storage. Use this when removing or replacing question/choice images.

url.description: The full URL of the image to delete

403.description: Forbidden - Requires ADMIN or OWNER role

get.description: Retrieve list of active tests available for practice

200.description: Returns array of available tests with question counts

get.description: Retrieve all test attempts for the authenticated user

post.description: Start a new test attempt or resume an existing IN_PROGRESS attempt. Returns first question without correct answer.

201.description: Test started/resumed successfully. Returns attempt ID and first question.

404.description: Test not found or not active

get.description: Retrieve the current question for an active attempt. SECURITY: Does not include correct answer flag.

200.description: Returns current question with choices (no correct answer information)

post.description: Move to the next question in the test
Move to the previous question in the test
Navigate to a specific question by index (0-based)
Submit answer for current question. SECURITY: Answer saved immediately to database, no correctness feedback until test submission.

200.description: Answer submitted successfully. Does NOT return correctness.

get.description: Retrieve list of answered question IDs for UI state. SECURITY: Does not include correct answers or scoring.

200.description: Returns list of answered questions (no correctness information)

post.description: Complete current module and proceed to next step (Module 2, Break, or Next Section). Adaptive logic applies for Module 2 selection.

200.description: Module completed. Returns next step information.

get.description: Check if break is in progress and when it ends. Automatically starts next section if break is complete.

200.description: Returns break status and remaining time or starts next section

post.description: Mark attempt as ABANDONED. Allows user to start a fresh attempt later.
SECURITY: Submit test and calculate score on backend. This is the ONLY endpoint that reveals correct answers and scoring.

200.description: Test submitted successfully. Returns score and detailed results with correct answers.

get.description: Retrieve full results for a completed test attempt. Only available after test submission.

200.description: Returns complete test results with SAT scaled scores (200-800 per section, 400-1600 total)

post.description: Bookmark a question for later review (like official Bluebook app)

200.description: Returns updated mark for review status

get.description: Get list of questions marked for review in current module

200.description: Returns list of marked question IDs and indices

patch.description: Cross out answer choices (like official Bluebook app option eliminator)

get.description: Get remaining time for current module with 5-minute warning flag

200.description: Returns remaining seconds, time expired flag, and 5-minute warning

post.description: End break early and continue to next section (like official SAT)

200.description: Break skipped, returns next section info

get.description: Get College Board-style score report with section breakdowns and percentile

200.description: Returns detailed score report with percentile, strengths, and areas for improvement

post.description: Create a highlight annotation on a passage (like official Bluebook app)

get.description: Get all highlights for a question
Get the percentile rank for a given SAT score (400-1600)

post.description: Seed score conversion tables and percentile data
Seed raw-to-scaled score conversion tables
Seed SAT score percentile distribution data

info.title: SAT Practice Platform API
info.description: Backend API for SAT practice test platform with secure authentication, role-based access control, and backend-driven test logic

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration, login, and profile management

tags.name: Tests (Admin)
tags.description: Admin-only endpoints for managing tests, questions, and choices

tags.name: Practice (Student)
tags.description: Student endpoints for taking practice tests

userId.description: User ID to change role for

ban.description: Set to true to ban (deactivate) user, false to unban (activate)

description.example: Full-length Digital SAT practice test with adaptive modules

sections.description: Array of sections (English and Math) to create with the test (optional)

description.example: Full-length Digital SAT practice test with adaptive modules

sections.description: Array of sections (English and Math) to create with the test (optional)

isActive.description: Whether the test is active and available to students

choiceText.description: The text of the answer choice

isCorrect.description: Whether this choice is the correct answer

imageBase64.description: Base64 encoded image data for this answer choice. Include the data URI prefix (e.g., "data:image/png;base64,iVBOR..."). Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG. Max 5MB.

imageUrl.description: URL for image (auto-populated after upload, or provide existing URL)

difficulty.description: Difficulty level for adaptive Module 2 selection

correctAnswer.description: Correct answer for STUDENT_PRODUCED questions (numeric or text)

contentDomain.description: Content domain for categorization and analytics

imageBase64.description: Base64 encoded image data for this question. Include the data URI prefix (e.g., "data:image/png;base64,iVBOR..."). Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG. Max 5MB.

imageUrl.description: URL for charts, graphs, tables, or images (auto-populated after upload, or provide existing URL)

choices.description: Array of answer choices (required for MULTIPLE_CHOICE, optional for STUDENT_PRODUCED)

title.description: Title of the SAT practice test

description.example: Full-length SAT practice test with Reading/Writing and Math sections

url.description: Public URL of the uploaded file

choiceId.description: Selected choice ID (required for MULTIPLE_CHOICE questions)

replyCount.description: Number of replies to this comment

content.example: This was a great test! The math section was challenging.
Updated: This was a great test!

date.description: The exam date in ISO 8601 format

description.description: Optional description for the exam date
